title: cistanthe subspeciosa
intro: Cistanthe subspeciosa, also known as the 'Pink Star' or 'Pink Rockcress', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Montiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Cistanthe subspeciosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
